creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I updated to FreeBSD CURRENT r324123, I get the error:

acpi - panic -  timer op not net supported on boot

A screenshot of this error is available.

The specs of the machine are:

Intel Core i7 4770S
Asus H87M-E Motherboard
16GB DDR3
1TB Seagate HDD & 64GB Sandisk SSD
FreeBSD 12-CURRENT
ZFS on Root on 1TB Seagate with Sandisk as ZFS cache
